title: Frost Rider
description: Small Datapack/Mod that makes frost walker function on horses and other mounts!
body:
Frost Rider is a small QOL datapack/mod that aims to expand the utility of the Frost Walker enchantment, allowing you to travel across oceans with your favorite mount and ride off into the sunset!
If you have Frost Walker on your boots, your mounts will have it too.

### Mounts supported:
- Horses (all variants)
- Donkeys
- Mules
- Camels (both variants)
- Striders
- Pigs

![Riding into the sunset on your horse with frost walker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22c732f277258cea25002b752fb73ced25afe68d.png)
